title: Music Box Studio
description: Design melodies on a visual drum grid, hear them played by synthesized music-box tines, and export your tune as a WAV.
concept: A 16–32 step sequencer where each row is a pitch on your chosen scale (pentatonic, major, minor, blues, or chromatic) and each column is a beat. Click pegs onto the drum, hit Play, and watch the tines wobble as the notes pluck. Switch scales and root notes mid-session, dial in reverb and BPM, save your pattern to localStorage, or share it via URL hash. When your melody is ready, export a full-quality WAV with reverb tail.
features: 5 musical scales × 7 root keys — 2 octaves of notes
8/16/24/32 step patterns with per-beat visual dividers
Synthesized music-box tones: 3-harmonic sine stack with exponential decay
Animated tine panel — metal strips wobble on strike with amber glow
Reverb convolution (synthetic impulse response) with wet/dry slider
WAV export via OfflineAudioContext — full pattern with reverb tail
Save/load to localStorage and share via URL hash
Default melody pre-loaded so it sounds good on first open

interaction.mouse: Click or drag across the drum grid to toggle pegs on/off
interaction.click: Play/Stop, scale tabs, root selector, BPM/volume/reverb sliders, save/load/export/share
interaction.touch: Touch-drag on grid; all controls tap-accessible
